content: Just as Self-Refine lets LLMs iteratively polish initial outputs without external supervision or training data, human personal growth can be structured as an unsupervised 'Self-Refine for life' framework built on the dynamic self-reflection memory mechanism of Reflexion agents. This framework replaces the need for external coaching or rigid life planning by leveraging accumulated reflection memory to iteratively refine choices and habits, much like both frameworks refine AI outputs without external labels.
